overview.subtitle: Real-time market-wide metrics, dominance, and sentiment at a glance

fear_greed.title: Fear & Greed Index
fear_greed.subtitle: The Fear and Greed Index measures market sentiment on a scale of 0 (Extreme Fear) to 100 (Extreme Greed)

treemap.title: Market Heatmap
treemap.subtitle: Live crypto market visualized by market cap & price change

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.empty: Your watchlist is empty — search for coins above to add them

coin_row.vol_tooltip: 24h Volume / Market Cap — higher = more liquid
coin_row.rec_tooltip_READY: All conditions met — strong trend, aligned EMAs, bullish momentum, good risk/reward. Ready for entry.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_WAIT_PULLBACK: Current price not at ideal entry level. Wait for pullback to support zone before entering.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_WAIT_BREAKOUT: Setup needs breakout confirmation. Wait for price to break key resistance with volume.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_WAIT_CONFIRMATION: Some signals are not fully aligned yet. Wait for additional confirmation before entering.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_WAIT_VOLUME: Confidence is building but volume confirmation needed. Let the setup mature.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_SKIP_HIGH_RISK: Risk level too high for current conditions. Consider smaller position or wait for better risk profile.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_SKIP_WEAK_TREND: Overall trend or score too weak. No clear directional bias — skip this setup.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_SKIP_LOW_RR: Risk/reward ratio below 1:2. Potential reward does not justify the risk.
coin_row.rec_tooltip_SKIP_INVALID_SETUP: One or more conditions failed — low score, wrong direction, or missing trade parameters.

analysis_score.title: Analysis Score
analysis_score.tooltip: Weighted score (0–100): Volume (35%), Trend (25%), Technicals (20%), Sentiment (20%). ≥60 = LONG, ≤40 = SHORT.

interpretation.action_strong_buy: High conviction — all factors align for a long position.
interpretation.action_buy: Moderate conviction — favorable setup for a long position.
interpretation.action_hold: Slightly bullish — but not enough to act, wait for confirmation.
interpretation.action_watch: Slightly bearish — no clear signal, monitor for direction.
interpretation.action_short_entry: Moderate conviction — favorable setup for a short position.
interpretation.action_strong_short: High conviction — all factors align for a short position.

market_stats.title: Market Stats
market_stats.tooltip: Real-time market data from Binance. Hover each stat for details.

tooltips.volume_24h: Total trading volume in the last 24 hours (USD)
tooltips.high_24h: Highest price in the last 24 hours
tooltips.low_24h: Lowest price in the last 24 hours
tooltips.ath: Highest price since the coin's launch
tooltips.atl: Lowest price since the coin's launch
tooltips.circ_supply: Number of coins currently in circulation
tooltips.vol_mcap: 24h Volume ÷ Market Cap — liquidity indicator; higher = more active trading

technical_indicators.title: Technical Indicators
technical_indicators.tooltip: Hover each indicator for a brief explanation of what it means.

tooltips.rsi: Relative Strength Index (14 periods): >70 = overbought, <30 = oversold. Helps identify potential reversal points.
tooltips.macd: Moving Average Convergence Divergence: trend-following momentum indicator. MACD > Signal = bullish momentum.
tooltips.macd_signal: 9-period EMA of MACD line. Crossovers with MACD generate trade signals.
tooltips.macd_histogram: MACD line − Signal line. Positive = increasing momentum, negative = decreasing momentum.
tooltips.ema_9: 9-period Exponential Moving Average. Shorter-term trend indicator. Price above = short-term uptrend.
tooltips.ema_21: 21-period Exponential Moving Average. Medium-term trend indicator. Price above = medium-term uptrend.
tooltips.bb_upper: Upper band (2 std dev above middle). Price touching this may indicate overbought conditions.
tooltips.bb_lower: Lower band (2 std dev below middle). Price touching this may indicate oversold conditions.

trend_analysis.title: Trend Analysis
trend_analysis.tooltip: Analysis of short, medium, and long-term price trends based on recent price action.
trend_analysis.description_bullish: Strong upward momentum with increasing buying pressure
trend_analysis.description_bearish: Downward trend with selling pressure dominating
trend_analysis.description_neutral: Consolidating with no clear directional bias

news_sentiment.title: News & Sentiment
news_sentiment.tooltip: Aggregated sentiment from news and social media sources.
news_sentiment.no_news: No recent news for this coin

support_resistance.title: Support & Resistance
support_resistance.tooltip: Key price levels where the coin has historically found support (buying pressure) or resistance (selling pressure).

coin_detail.fallback_message: Full analysis not available for this coin. Only Binance market data is shown.

explanation.summary_signals: {strengths} bullish signal(s), {weaknesses} bearish signal(s). Overall score {score}/100 ({signal}).
explanation.risk_elevated: Elevated risk — consider tighter position sizing

recommendation.open_detail: Open Position — favourable conditions across multiple dimensions
recommendation.wait_detail: Wait — weak conditions; reconsider entry or tighten risk
recommendation.neutral_detail: Neutral — monitor for clearer signals before acting

errors.cannot_resolve_symbol: Cannot resolve symbol: "{symbol}". Use a Binance symbol (e.g. BTCUSDT), coin ID (e.g. bitcoin), or base asset (e.g. BTC).
